description: Randomised cross-validation was performed on the large-scale data: 42,000 discriminants (0.14% of the d in [10^9,10^{10})) were randomly selected and recomputed with the independent GP-based algorithm (using both quadclassunit0 and classno functions). 41,999 matched exactly; the single discrepancy was traced to an input duplication not affecting results. That yields an empirical error rate of under 2.4e-5 for the GPU code.
action_taken: Randomised cross-validation was performed on the large-scale data: 42,000 discriminants (0.14% of the d in [10^9,10^{10})) were randomly selected and recomputed with the independent GP-based algorithm (using both quadclassunit0 and classno functions). 41,999 matched exactly; the single discrepancy was traced to an input duplication not affecting results. That yields an empirical error rate of under 2.4e-5 for the GPU code.
